IN THE SUM OF $1,800,000.00, AND JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF JANIS LANG AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO. IN THE SUM OF $200,000.00 PLUS COSTS AND INTEREST AS PROVIDED BY LAW, IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED LATER BY THE COURT. THE COURT SUA SPONTE TOOK MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUNE 6, 2002.
